title: [HW] Update HWLegalizeNames pass to generate TypeDeclOps.
body:
For the reasons discussed in https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/718,
it is desirable to be able to represent aliases in the type system,
but when it comes to exporting Verilog and other later
transformations, we require a TypeScopeOp and TypeDeclOps in the IR.

This pass generates the TypeScopeOp and TypeDeclOps for all
TypeAliasTypes present in the input IR. This can be a useful pre-pass
before ExportVerilog for frontends that just care about the types in
the IR, and not their backing definitions in Verilog output.
